body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": v6.98"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Minor Changes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Webstore checkout will now display a message if a customer has JavaScript disabled in their browser."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where eBay Business Policies couldn't be enabled in the store manager."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
